SELECT value, log2(value) AS binary_log FROM log2_test WHERE value > 1;
SELECT n, log2(n) AS binary_log FROM numbers;
SELECT mixed_value, log2(mixed_value) FROM mixed_values WHERE mixed_value > 0;
CREATE TABLE calc_log AS SELECT value FROM log2_test;
SELECT log2(item.value + 1) FROM (SELECT value FROM log2_test AS item) AS subquery;
SELECT A.value, log2(A.value) AS log_value, B.value AS another_val FROM log2_test AS A JOIN numbers AS B ON A.value < B.n;
SELECT log2(x.value) FROM (SELECT value FROM log2_test WHERE value > 3) AS x;
